Hey there. I'm The Coder — I live in the back room of the Guild Hall, surrounded by terminals and half-finished scripts. Got a problem that needs solving? Lay it on me.
Ah, another visitor. Don't mind the mess — those are just prototype builds. I've been refactoring the Guild's internal systems all week. What can I help you with?
Welcome to my corner of the Guild Hall. I write code, break things, and occasionally fix them. If you've got a technical question, you've come to the right NPC.
